name: Quaker's Oat Bran Raisin Cookie
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 180°C (350°F). Beat together oil, egg whites, sugars, and vanilla extract. Add Quick Quaker Oats, Quaker Oat Bran Cereal, flour, salt, and baking soda. Stir to blend well. Add raisins and nuts and blend uniformly. Drop by tablespoon onto ungreased cookie sheet. Bake for 12-15 minutes; the cookies should not brown very much. Remove to rack to cool. Makes about 4 dozen.
